description: A featured image block combining a responsive picture element with a descriptive text panel containing a heading, body text, a label title, and an optional arrow link indicator.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Full featured image block with heading, body text, feat-title label and arrow

props.imageAlt: Image of two people sitting on sofas in therapy setting
props.heading: Pioneering therapy could offer hope for psychosis patients
props.bodyText: A pioneering therapy for people with psychosis could lead to a transformative intervention for a condition estimated to cost England almost £12 billion a year.

stories.name: WithFigcaption
stories.description: Featured image block with a figcaption below the image

props.imageAlt: Two sedated adult Drosophila, one male and one female.
props.heading: Why do we study flies?
props.bodyText: Here at the University of Sheffield Fly Facility we use the fruit fly as a model organism to study a wide variety of biological processes.
props.featTitle: Find out why they are useful.

stories.name: MinimalDescription
stories.description: Featured image with only a feat-title label and arrow, no heading or body text

stories.name: NoArrow
stories.description: Featured image with heading and body text but no link arrow or feat-title

props.heading: Dr Laura Corns
props.bodyText:
Associate University Teacher

School of Biosciences
Development, Regeneration and Neurophysiology

notes: The .img_container always contains a .media--image--figure wrapper with a figure.imgcapt holding a picture element with img fallback. The figcaption inside the figure is optional. The .img_descript panel contains a .descripttext div with an optional h3 heading, optional bodyText (ReactNode), and an optional .feat-title paragraph. The .link-arrow div with .fmarrow child (Font Awesome fas fa-arrow-right icon) is present when showLinkArrow is true. The paragraph--type--featured-image class is a Drupal wrapper class that wraps the .featured-image div — it is listed in selectorsCovered but is NOT the root element.
